pattern: (?i)(this (?:dataset|software|model|repository|code)[^.]*(?:may not|must not|shall not|is not to)[^.]*be used[^.]*(?:to train|for training)[^.]*machine learning[^.]*\.)
description: Explicit clause prohibiting use of this dataset/software to train machine learning models.
Ad-hoc addendum forbidding use of the content for AI training purposes.
Explicit prohibition on use as training data for generative models.

pattern: (?i)(you agree not to use the model or derivatives of the model[^.]*\.)
description: OpenRAIL-style behavioral use restriction on the model and its derivatives.
Responsible AI License (RAIL) style reference to a restricted-uses section.
Ambiguous restriction on commercial use that may cover commercial ML training.
Research/academic-only grant, ambiguous for production ML training use.
